description: Blueprint for extracting structured data from solar panel inspection reports - demonstrates that the BDA blueprint pattern applies beyond Oil and Gas to any energy sub-vertical

Site_Name.instruction: Extract the solar farm or site name from the report header

Site_ID.instruction: Extract the site identifier or project number from the header

Location.instruction: Extract the site address or GPS coordinates from the header

Inspection_Date.instruction: Extract the date the inspection was performed

Inspector.instruction: Extract the name of the inspector or inspection company

System_Capacity_kW.instruction: Extract the total system capacity in kilowatts from the site summary

Panel_ID.instruction: Extract the panel or string identifier from the inspection table

Degradation_Percent.instruction: Extract the panel degradation percentage from the performance data

Defect_Type.instruction: Extract the type of defect found (hotspot, cracking, delamination, soiling, none) from the inspection findings

Severity.instruction: Extract the severity rating (critical, major, minor, none) from the findings table

Inverter_ID.instruction: Extract the inverter identifier from the equipment status section

Efficiency_Percent.instruction: Extract the inverter efficiency percentage from the performance metrics

Error_Codes.instruction: Extract any active error codes or fault conditions from the inverter status

Last_Service_Date.instruction: Extract the date of last maintenance service for this inverter

Actual_Output_kWh.instruction: Extract the actual energy output in kWh for the reporting period

Expected_Output_kWh.instruction: Extract the expected or modeled energy output in kWh for the reporting period

Performance_Ratio.instruction: Extract the performance ratio (actual/expected) from the summary metrics

Availability_Percent.instruction: Extract the system availability percentage from the uptime metrics

Site_Information.instruction: Extract all site identification and location information from the report header

Panel_Conditions.instruction: Extract panel condition data for each inspected panel or string from the findings table

Inverter_Status.instruction: Extract inverter status and performance data from the equipment section

Performance_Metrics.instruction: Extract overall site performance metrics from the summary section
